{{Infobox character
| name = High Consort Seredash
| aliases = High Consort, Seredash
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|construct a Pattern to manifest the limbs of impossible beasts}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[High Consort Seredash|High Consort]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|High Consort Seredash is a powerful leader who has significantly increased the influence of the Tanakite priests. He achieved this through an advancement in his [[Pattern Construction]], which allowed him to claim he had glimpsed the deity Mul'Tanak and accessed a realm beyond the known worlds. Driven by a desire for divine power, Seredash led a campaign involving the sacrifice of many people. During a ritual in the [[Tomb of Scrolls]], he attempted to summon his goddess using the blood of prisoners and enemies. Despite his ability to manifest the limbs of mythical creatures through his patterns, Seredash ultimately faced a confrontation with Mul'Tanak, where he was wounded while questioning the deity.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|High Consort Seredash is a tall, twisted man who wears red robes adorned with spider leg designs and has painted symbols on his face to mimic a spider. Driven by the promise of power from the goddess [[Mul’Tanak]], he committed to a campaign and prostrated himself before her. He believes in his ability to summon the deity and possesses the power to [[construct]] a [[Pattern]] that manifests the limbs of impossible beasts.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[High Consort Seredash]] believes he can summon his goddess.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The High Consort is a tall but twisted man wearing red robes decorated with spider's leg designs.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[High Consort Seredash]] has painted symbols on his face to mirror a spider's face.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[High Consort Seredash]] can [[construct]] a [[Pattern]] to manifest the limbs of impossible beasts.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The High Consort prostrated himself before [[Mul’Tanak]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Seredash committed a campaign for the promise of power from [[Mul’Tanak]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
